output.summary: Successfully refactored GalleryCarousel to use pseudo-element dark mode pattern matching other carousel blocks, standardized padding to py-18 md:py-23, added inert management for inactive slides, and updated TestimonialsCarousel.css to use CSS variables for consistency.

changes: Refactored container to use pseudo-element dark mode: container relative py-18 md:py-23 before:absolute before:bg-charcoal before:rounded-3xl before:-z-1 before:-inset-x-(--side-gutter) before:inset-y-0 md:before:-inset-x-8
Removed inner bg-charcoal div with py-9 sm:py-24 padding - dark background now provided by pseudo-element
Repositioned noise texture overlay to match pseudo-element bounds: absolute inset-x-(--side-gutter) md:inset-x-8 inset-y-0
Added className='mb-8 md:mb-16' to ThemeHeading to match other carousel blocks
Standardized vertical padding to py-18 md:py-23 (eliminates compound padding issue)
Mirrored PHP changes: refactored to pseudo-element pattern with same container classes
Repositioned noise texture overlay to match PHP structure
TSX and PHP now completely in sync
Added inert attribute management for inactive slides matching TestimonialsCarousel pattern (lines 108-129)
Inert management only applies when NOT in loop mode (element.dataset.loop !== '1')
updateInertSlides function sets inert on slides outside visible range (slidesPerView: 1, so only activeIndex is visible)
Updates on slideChange event to keep inert state synchronized
Prevents keyboard users from tabbing into off-screen slide content
Changed raw rgba values to CSS variable references for consistency
Values are identical, now using variables matches pattern in CardsCarousel/DynamicContentCarousel/GalleryCarousel

warnings: webpack performance warnings about bundle size (pre-existing, not related to changes)
eslint warnings in other blocks (Accordion, Archive, FullWidthMedia, Hero) - pre-existing, not related to GalleryCarousel changes

syncStatus.details: TSX and PHP structures now perfectly synchronized. Both use pseudo-element pattern with identical class names and structure.

after.outer: container relative py-18 md:py-23 with pseudo-element background

accessibilityImprovements.issue: Missing inert attribute on inactive slides
accessibilityImprovements.implementation: Added inert management in GalleryCarousel.js matching TestimonialsCarousel pattern. Off-screen slides now get inert attribute, preventing keyboard focus.

fixesApplied.description: Standardize GalleryCarousel padding to match other carousel blocks
fixesApplied.details: Refactored from compound padding (outer + inner) to single padding layer (py-18 md:py-23) using pseudo-element for dark background. Now consistent with CardsCarousel, TestimonialsCarousel, and DynamicContentCarousel.

fixesApplied.description: TestimonialsCarousel uses raw rgba values instead of CSS variables
fixesApplied.details: Changed from rgba(212, 255, 69, 1) / rgba(71, 203, 242, 1) to var(--color-neon-green) / var(--color-blue) for consistency with other carousel blocks.

fixesApplied.description: Missing inert attribute on inactive slides in GalleryCarousel
fixesApplied.details: Added inert management matching TestimonialsCarousel pattern. Prevents keyboard users from tabbing into off-screen slides.

notes: GalleryCarousel.css already had correct gradient color lock using CSS variables - no changes needed
The noise texture overlay is unique to GalleryCarousel and was preserved in the refactored structure
Slide ARIA attributes (role=group, aria-roledescription=slide, aria-label) are already handled correctly by updateSlideAriaAttributes function in JS
GalleryCarouselItem.php does not need slide ARIA changes - inner blocks cannot access their position in PHP, JS handles it correctly
All carousel blocks now use consistent patterns: pseudo-element dark mode, py-18 md:py-23 padding, neon-green/blue gradient lock, and inert management
